speaker: CYMBELINE
text: Again, and bring me word how ’tis with her.

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: A fever, with the absence of her son;

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: A madness, of which her life’s in danger. Heavens,

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: How deeply you at once do touch me! Imogen,

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: The great part of my comfort, gone; my queen

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: Upon a desperate bed, and in a time

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: When fearful wars point at me; her son gone,

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: So needful for this present. It strikes me past

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: The hope of comfort.—But for thee, fellow,

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: Who needs must know of her departure and

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: Dost seem so ignorant, we’ll enforce it from thee

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: By a sharp torture.

speaker: PISANIO
text: Sir, my life is yours.

speaker: PISANIO
text: I humbly set it at your will. But for my mistress,

speaker: PISANIO
text: I nothing know where she remains, why gone,

speaker: PISANIO
text: Nor when she purposes return. Beseech your Highness,

speaker: PISANIO
text: Hold me your loyal servant.

speaker: LORD
text: Good my liege,

speaker: LORD
text: The day that she was missing, he was here.

speaker: LORD
text: I dare be bound he’s true and shall perform

speaker: LORD
text: All parts of his subjection loyally. For Cloten,

speaker: LORD
text: There wants no diligence in seeking him,

speaker: LORD
text: And will no doubt be found.

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: The time is troublesome.

speaker: CYMBELINE
text:
To
                 
                Pisanio
                .
                 
              We’ll slip you for a season, but our jealousy

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: Does yet depend.

speaker: LORD
text: So please your Majesty,

speaker: LORD
text: The Roman legions, all from Gallia drawn,

speaker: LORD
text: Are landed on your coast with a supply

speaker: LORD
text: Of Roman gentlemen by the Senate sent.

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: Now for the counsel of my son and queen!

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: I am amazed with matter.

speaker: LORD
text: Good my liege,

speaker: LORD
text: Your preparation can affront no less

speaker: LORD
text: Than what you hear of. Come more, for more you’re ready.

speaker: LORD
text: The want is but to put those powers in motion

speaker: LORD
text: That long to move.

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: I thank you. Let’s withdraw,

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: And meet the time as it seeks us. We fear not

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: What can from Italy annoy us, but

speaker: CYMBELINE
text: We grieve at chances here. Away.

speaker: PISANIO
text: I heard no letter from my master since

speaker: PISANIO
text: I wrote him Imogen was slain. ’Tis strange.

speaker: PISANIO
text: Nor hear I from my mistress, who did promise

speaker: PISANIO
text: To yield me often tidings. Neither know I

speaker: PISANIO
text: What is betid to Cloten, but remain

speaker: PISANIO
text: Perplexed in all. The heavens still must work.

speaker: PISANIO
text: Wherein I am false I am honest; not true, to be true.

speaker: PISANIO
text: These present wars shall find I love my country,

speaker: PISANIO
text: Even to the note o’ th’ King, or I’ll fall in them.

speaker: PISANIO
text: All other doubts, by time let them be cleared.

speaker: PISANIO
text: Fortune brings in some boats that are not steered.
